message:
test(fcp-sandbox): add credential injection integration tests

Add 28 new tests covering egress proxy credential injection:
- HTTP header injection (bearer, API key, basic auth)
- Host binding enforcement (exact match, wildcard, suffix attacks)
- Capability gating (credential_allow list enforcement)
- Secret leakage prevention (error messages, debug output)
- TCP authentication
- Structured logging verification (DenyReason codes)

These tests prove the secretless credential handling model:
connectors never see actual secret bytes, only redaction markers.

Closes nnja (Credential Injection Unit Tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
